description: Extract a patient cohort for the 'DM2-ORAL-2024' clinical trial from the MedinTux database. Identify eligible patients based on the following criteria: age 30 to 75 years inclusive (calculated as of today), and a recorded Name and Date of Birth. Generate a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/cohort_dm2_oral_2024.csv with columns: 'patient_guid', 'nom', 'prenom', 'date_naissance', 'age', 'sexe', 'eligibility', and 'exclusion_reason'. Additionally, create a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/cohort_summary_dm2_oral_2024.txt including the protocol ID, counts (total, eligible, and excluded), a list of tables found in the 'DrTuxTest' database, and a list of diabetes codes (E10-E14) found in the 'CIM10Test' database.
